$comment_crons: The daily-briefing cron was disabled 2026-05-27. A Claude Code scheduled remote agent (routine trig_01R3cjtz9H7kPdThjtGxTNHX) now generates the briefing daily at 9am PT against Andrew's Max-plan usage, removing the per-call Anthropic API cost. The /api/cron/daily-briefing endpoint stays in the codebase as a manual escape hatch but is no longer triggered automatically. To re-enable, restore the crons array below.
